builtin.title: Built-in
builtin.fengShuiTitle: Feng Shui Color Sets by Element
builtin.fengShuiTip: Pick colors aligned with Metal, Water, Fire, Wood, and Earth profiles
builtin.autoColorByDateTime: No manual selection yet: the system auto-picks based on current lunar date/time (supportive or neutral when conflict appears)
builtin.birthYearTip: The system derives your element from lunar birth year and compares it with current lunar day/hour for matching colors
builtin.conflictRecommendation: Current lunar day/hour conflicts ({{dayElement}} / {{hourElement}}), neutral palette is prioritized to reduce clash
builtin.onlySupportingGroup: After entering birth year, only supportive element color groups are displayed
builtin.onlyNeutralGroupWhenConflict: When lunar day/hour conflicts with your element, only neutral anti-conflict colors are shown
builtin.userElementEmpty: Enter your birth year to see element and color guidance
builtin.groupClassicTip: Balanced neutral palette suitable for most systems
builtin.groupMetalTip: Metal favors white, metallic, and bright gold tones
builtin.groupWaterTip: Water favors blue and cool deep tones
builtin.groupFireTip: Fire favors red, coral, and warm vivid tones
builtin.groupWoodTip: Wood favors green and natural organic tones
builtin.groupEarthTip: Earth favors amber, sand, and stable earthy tones
builtin.groupNeutralTip: Neutral tones for periods when lunar day/hour clashes with your element
builtin.lunarHourTip: The system checks the current lunar day to classify favorable and unfavorable hours
builtin.inauspiciousNow: Current hour is inauspicious: {{branch}} ({{range}}), act carefully
builtin.auspiciousDo1: Sign contracts and finalize important agreements
builtin.auspiciousDo2: Launch products, features, or key announcements
builtin.auspiciousDo4: Start projects or execute critical milestones
builtin.auspiciousDo5: Meet partners, negotiate, and handle outreach
builtin.auspiciousDo6: Perform tasks related to growth, opportunities, and expansion
builtin.inauspiciousAvoid2: Avoid high-risk investment or impulsive decisions
builtin.inauspiciousAvoid3: Avoid direct confrontation and tense conflict handling
builtin.inauspiciousAvoid4: Avoid urgent long-distance travel without preparation
builtin.inauspiciousAvoid5: Avoid starting large initiatives prone to delays
builtin.inauspiciousAvoid6: Avoid announcing major changes before team alignment
builtin.canDuongDesc: Yang stem (Jia, Bing, Wu, Geng, Ren) — active energy, outward, expansive
builtin.canAmDesc: Yin stem (Yi, Ding, Ji, Xin, Gui) — quiet energy, inward, cautious
builtin.duongTrachDo1: Open new business, start ventures, launch new projects
builtin.duongTrachDo2: Sign contracts, negotiate, close important deals
builtin.duongTrachAvoid1: Avoid prolonged rest or staying hidden
builtin.duongTrachAvoid2: Avoid funeral rites or solemn yin ceremonies
builtin.amTrachDo1: Study, research, read, absorb new knowledge
builtin.amTrachDo2: Plan, analyze in detail, conduct internal reviews
builtin.amTrachDo3: Rest, meditate, recover health and energy
builtin.amTrachDo4: Perform ceremonies, ancestral rites, spiritual practices
builtin.amTrachAvoid1: Avoid opening new business or starting major ventures
builtin.amTrachAvoid2: Avoid major contract negotiations or long-distance travel
builtin.amTrachAvoid3: Avoid public announcements or important product launches
builtin.duongTrachSectionDesc: Home, construction & moving feng shui — assessed by the 12 Officers cycle (Trực/建除)
builtin.duongTrachRatingTot: Auspicious — favorable for building and moving
builtin.duongTrachTructKienDesc: Rising energy — good for breaking ground, laying foundations
builtin.duongTrachTructTruDesc: Clearing — good for demolition, clearing site before building
builtin.duongTrachTructManDesc: Overfull — avoid earthwork and major renovations
builtin.duongTrachTructBinhDesc: Balance — good for minor repairs, interior decoration
builtin.duongTrachTructDinhDesc: Stability — good for fixed installations, finishing, fitting doors
builtin.duongTrachTructChapDesc: Maintain status quo — avoid major changes; maintenance ok
builtin.duongTrachTructPhaDesc: Destruction — avoid all construction and home activities
builtin.duongTrachTructNguyDesc: Danger — avoid rooftop work and scaffolding; risk of accidents
builtin.duongTrachTructThanhDesc: Achievement — auspicious for moving in, housewarming
builtin.duongTrachTructThuDesc: Gathering — suitable for packing, preparing to move
builtin.duongTrachTructKhaiDesc: Opening — auspicious for housewarming, opening new home
builtin.duongTrachTructBeDesc: Sealed — inauspicious for moving in; energy blocked
builtin.duongTrachDo_kien: Break ground, lay foundations, begin construction
builtin.duongTrachDo_tru: Demolish old structures, clear site before building
builtin.duongTrachDo_dinh: Fixed installations, finish interior, fit doors and gates
builtin.duongTrachDo_chap: Maintenance checks; avoid major structural changes
builtin.duongTrachDo_pha: Avoid all construction and moving activities
builtin.duongTrachDo_nguy: No rooftop or high work; indoor office tasks only
builtin.duongTrachDo_thu: Pack belongings, clear storage, prepare to move
builtin.duongTrachDo_khai: Housewarming, move in, open new home
builtin.duongTrachDo_be: Avoid moving in; indoor administrative tasks acceptable
builtin.amTrachSectionDesc: Tomb & burial feng shui — assessed by the 12 Officers cycle (Trực/建除)
builtin.tructKienDesc: New beginnings — inauspicious for burial, interment, grave earthwork
builtin.tructTruDesc: Clearing — suitable for cleaning and tidying graves
builtin.tructManDesc: Overfull — unfavorable for tomb feng shui
builtin.tructBinhDesc: Harmony — good for site selection, grave repairs
builtin.tructDinhDesc: Stability — good for erecting headstones, completing tombs
builtin.tructChapDesc: Secure — especially auspicious for burial, coffin lowering
builtin.tructPhaDesc: Destruction — absolutely avoid all tomb/burial activities
builtin.tructThanhDesc: Achievement — auspicious for burial, reinterment, headstones
builtin.tructThuDesc: Reception — suitable for offerings, ancestral rites
builtin.tructKhaiDesc: Opening — good for site selection, breaking ground
builtin.tructBeDesc: Sealed — inauspicious for burial, yin energy blocked
builtin.amTrachDo_kien: Remote tidying of grave area only
builtin.amTrachDo_tru: Clean graves, clear weeds, general upkeep
builtin.amTrachDo_man: Avoid all intervention with burial land
builtin.amTrachDo_binh: Site selection, survey; repair and maintain tombs
builtin.amTrachDo_dinh: Erect headstones, complete tomb; offerings and incense
builtin.amTrachDo_chap: Burial, lowering coffin; filling and mounding grave
builtin.amTrachDo_pha: Do not perform any tomb or burial activities
builtin.amTrachDo_nguy: Offerings from afar only, no earthwork
builtin.amTrachDo_khai: Select burial site, break ground, begin construction

layout.title: Layout
layout.twoColumnNavigationTip: Vertical two-column menu at the side position
layout.mixedNavigationTip: Primary navigation at the top, secondary navigation at the side
layout.ribbonNavigationTip: Office-style ribbon: tabs at top, grouped action buttons in a band below
layout.ribbonRequiresDesktop: Ribbon navigation requires a desktop screen (≥ 1200px)
layout.ribbonShadowLevelTip: Adjust visual elevation for ribbon groups and buttons
